summary: Soul Chapter Cards feature testing complete. All 10 features tested and working correctly on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Backend APIs verified with 9/9 tests passing.

details: All 6 chapter cards display on /pet-home: Identity, Behaviour, Health, Social, Nutrition, Learning
Each card shows correct score percentage from pet's doggy_soul_answers
Mira summaries display correctly based on answered questions
Cards use correct chapter colors (purple, pink, red, amber, green, blue)
Clicking chapter card opens SoulChapterModal (NOT navigating to /soul-builder)
Modal has data-testid='soul-chapter-modal-{chapter_id}'
Modal z-index is 50001 (above other content)
'What Mira Knows' section displays answered questions
Each answered question shows label and value from doggy_soul_answers
Values formatted correctly (arrays joined with commas)
'Tell Mira More' section shows unanswered questions
Questions display with clickable option buttons
Text input fields available for text-type questions
Options have data-testid='chapter-opt-{question_id}-{option}'
Selecting an option shows 'Save answer' button
Clicking 'Save answer' submits to POST /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/answer
API returns updated scores
'+X pts added' indicator shows after successful submission
After submitting, answered question moves from 'Tell Mira More' to 'What Mira Knows'
Score percentage updates in modal header
Answered count updates (e.g., '6/8 answered')
For 100% chapters, modal shows '{name}'s {chapter} profile is complete'
Mojo's Identity chapter shows 'Mojo's identity profile is complete'
No 'Tell Mira More' section when all questions answered
X button (data-testid='soul-chapter-modal-close') closes modal
Backdrop click closes modal
Modal properly unmounts after close
Pet selector at top of /pet-home works correctly
Switching pets updates all chapter cards with new pet's data
Bruno shows partial scores (57% Identity, 86% Behaviour, etc.)
Mojo shows 100% on all chapters
Coco (0% score pet) shows 'Tap to tell Mira →' on all chapter cards
All chapters show 0% for empty pet
Modal shows all 8 questions as unanswered for empty pet

critical_code_review_comments: SoulChapterModal.jsx correctly implements all required features
data-testid attributes properly added for all interactive elements
Score recalculation works via onScoreUpdated callback
Chapter score calculation in PetHomePage.jsx uses correct field mappings
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test pets (Mojo, Bruno, Coco)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soul Chapter Cards feature fully implemented and tested. SoulChapterModal component at /app/frontend/src/components/SoulChapterModal.jsx. Chapter cards in PetHomePage.jsx lines 640-688. Backend answer endpoint at POST /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/answer. Test pets: Mojo (100% score, 81 answers), Bruno (87% score, 27 answers), Coco (0% score, 0 answers). All modal interactions working: open via card click, close via X or backdrop, answer submission with live score update.
